About

Building things that matter

I'm a B.Tech student in Computer Science Engineering (AI & ML) at CMR College of Engineering & Technology, with a 8.5 GPA. I'm drawn to the intersection of intelligent systems and practical software — the kind of work where machine learning meets real users.

My projects span Flutter mobile platforms, deep learning for medical diagnostics, and AI-driven environmental tools. I complement academic work with industry certifications — holding three ServiceNow credentials alongside certificates from Cisco and Board Infinity.

I maintain a 400+ day consecutive learning streak, which reflects something I genuinely believe: consistent daily effort compounds into capability.

AI-Enabled Water Well Predictor

Python Machine Learning Flask

Diabetic Retinopathy Detection

A deep learning project that detects diabetic retinopathy from retinal fundus images using CNN-based classification with parameter tuning for improved model accuracy.

Python TensorFlow CNN Computer Vision
